creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

I just checked your website.  And I could not any indication about 
FreeBSD in there.  In fact, the site does not even mention that you are 
doing any UNIX/FreeBSD consulting at all.  It only speak about 
"webdesign" and "webdesign consulting".

To add ad company to this list we need some proof that they are really 
doing some "FreeBSD consulting", meaning consulting for FreeBSD, UNIX, 
networking and so on.

But this not the case with your website at the moment.  Unless further 
information is provided about this we will have to close this PR.  For 
the moment I will set it to "feedback needed" (with a timeout of 2 weeks).

Regards


jkois


-- 
  Johann Kois
  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
  FreeBSD Documentation Project
  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
